mnemonics.title: Addressing Modes
mnemonics.content: I Ate Delicious Ice Cream Really: Immediate, Absolute, Direct, Indirect, Register, Relative

acronyms.usage: Final computed memory address for operand

visualTips.visualization: Imagine opcode as head, addressing mode as neck, operands as arms of instruction

analogies.analogy: Like different GPS navigation methods: direct coordinates (immediate), street address (direct), landmark-based (relative)
